# Jetson Orin Nano (ARM64 / aarch64) — pinned lockfile.
# IMPORTANT: This file was generated from an x86 laptop venv. It must be regenerated
# on the physical Jetson after: pip install flwr xgboost numpy pandas pyarrow aiocoap influxdb-client
# Use: pip freeze > client/requirements.txt  (with Jetson venv active, no [simulation] extras)
#
# Removed from x86 snapshot:
#   - nvidia-nccl-cu12: x86-only binary wheel; JetPack provides NCCL at the system level
#   - ray: pulled in by flwr[simulation]; Jetson runs flower-supernode, not simulation
#
